title: Lucid (LCID) Q1 2026 Earnings Preview: What Analysts Are Watching
text: Lucid (LCID) Q1 2026 Earnings Preview. Key Analyst Expectations. Revenue Forecast: Analysts project approximately $370 million in revenue, representing a 57% year-over-year increase. Profitability Outlook: Wall Street expects a per-share loss of $2.35, which would be a modest improvement from the $2.40 loss reported in Q1 2025. Price Target: The consensus price target across analysts is $13.13, suggesting over 100% potential upside from current trading levels near $6.53. Market Volatility Expectations. Options markets are pricing in a potential 13.30% price swing following the May 5 earnings release. Notable Context. Track Record: Lucid has missed earnings in six of the last nine quarters. Analyst Sentiment: Current consensus rating is Hold (7 Hold, 2 Sell, 1 Buy ratings). Year-to-Date Performance: Shares have declined 38%. Supply Chain Issue: The Gravity SUV experienced a 29-day delivery suspension due to supplier complications. Uber Partnership: Uber has expanded its vehicle order commitment to at least 35,000 units.
